# Assurgit

> Online Presence Launch System for service businesses. Short-form AI clone content every week using your avatar and voice clone — researched, scripted, and published on autopilot.

## What Assurgit Does

Assurgit is an Online Presence Launch System for service businesses. The core offer is the AI Clone Content System: businesses get 5–10+ professionally produced, fully branded short-form videos every week without filming. Each video uses a personalized AI avatar and voice clone (built from a 30-minute setup session) to look and sound exactly like the business owner or spokesperson.

The system:
- Monitors each client's competitive landscape weekly
- Writes platform-optimized scripts for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube
- Renders videos using AI avatar and voice clone technology
- Adds captions, formatting, and branding
- Publishes directly to all platforms (Starter and Growth plans)
- Sends a weekly competitive intelligence briefing (Starter and Growth plans)
- Includes an optional Presence Infrastructure layer (GBP, listings, GEO, social setup)
- Offers Website + Presence Launch as a project-based add-on

## Plans

- **Launch** — $397/month — 5 short-form videos/week, MP4 delivery, all 4 platforms, avatar + voice clone, human QC
- **Starter** — $997/month — 5 videos/week + auto-publishing + weekly competitive intel + Friday strategy call
- **Growth** — $1,997/month — 10+ videos/week + auto-publishing + white-glove service + monthly business review

All plans are month-to-month with no contracts. Non-recurring offers: Presence Infrastructure (add-on) and Website + Presence Launch (project-based).

## Who It's For

Local service businesses, coaches, consultants, loan officers, advisors, and growing service providers who want consistent video presence on social media but don't have time to film, script, or edit content.

## Technology

- Avatar and voice clone: AI-generated from short video + audio recordings
- Research pipeline: Custom AI system monitoring competitor content, trending topics, and keyword opportunities
- Script writing: AI-assisted with human review
- Publishing: Direct integration with Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube

## Free Tools

- **AI Video Tool Rankings** (https://assurgit.com/tools/ai-video-tools) — Rankings and comparisons of AI video creation tools
